title: Aces Full
description: A modpack for fun. Adds new biomes including many new tree types and ore types, loads of new mobs, a variety of extra crops, and new items such as backpacks, ships, and decorative blocks to expand the capabilities of building.
body:
**NOTE: this modpack only works on version 1.20.1 for forge.**

A simple modpack for fun. It expands upon the base game of Minecraft and creates a full and rich world to explore, with plenty of new biomes in each of the three dimensions that adds many new tree types, flowers, and blocks to use for exploration or decoration. It also adds several new ore types for extra mining fun and generates new villages and pillager outposts in different styles to explore. You can also build functioning ships to make it easier to explore your wonderful new world.

In addition to exploration, this modpack adds animals from real life into the game, as well as a variety of extra crops and cooking recipes, to give the game a little flavour from real life. Decorate your own character with a variety of backpacks that can be used for storage and upgraded to perform all sorts of functions, such as being able to play music discs. 

**Included Mods:**
- Balm (required)
- Biomes o'Plenty (adds new biomes)
- Carry On (allows players to physically pick up mobs and entities)
- Citadel (required)
- Cristelib (required)
- Fortuitous Feasts (adds more crops and cooking recipes)
- Geckolib (required)
- Gravestone (puts player's inventory in a collectable gravestone upon death)
- Macaws Bridges (adds new bridge blocks in different wood types) 
- Macaws Doors (adds new doors in different wood types)
- Macaws Fences (adds new fences in different wood types)
- Macaws Furniture (adds new furniture blocks in different wood types)
- Macaws Lights (adds new lights)
- Macaws Paintings (adds new paintings)
- Macaws Paths (adds new path blocks in different wood types)
- Macaws Roofs (adds new roof blocks in different wood types)
- Macaws Trapdoors (adds new trapdoor blocks in different wood types)
- Macaws Windows (adds new window blocks in different wood types)
- Naturalist (adds some real life animals)
- Pure Ores (adds a variety of new ores)
- Small Ships (adds craftable and sailable ships)
- Sophisticated Backpacks (adds craftable and useable backpacks)
- Sophisticated Core (required)
- Terra Blender (required)
- Towns and Towers (adds new designs for generated towns and pillager outposts)
- Waystones (adds waystones to teleport between locations)
